mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_model_config (model_name, provider, api_url, api_key, model_id, temperature, max_tokens, system_prompt, is_default, is_enabled, sort_order) VALUES (#{modelName}, #{provider}, #{apiUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{modelId}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{systemPrompt}, #{isDefault}, #{isEnabled}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_model_config ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_model_config WHERE is_default=1 AND is_enabled=1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_model_config SET is_default=1 WHERE id=#{id}
